description_long: This is a freestanding bulletin board with a sturdy rectangular metal frame and two wide, flat base plates for stability. The front panel features a large, yellow information display with Russian text, Braille, and simple diagrams, likely providing instructions or a map for a public facility such as a restroom. The display is encased in a protective transparent cover, bordered by a slim metallic bezel. The rear side is solid and opaque, finished in black, with no visible signage or openings. The frame is constructed from tubular metal, with clean, right-angled joints and a utilitarian design. The overall construction suggests durability and weather resistance, suitable for high-traffic public environments.
description: A freestanding metal bulletin board with a yellow information panel, Braille, and diagrams, supported by a robust rectangular frame and wide base plates.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow information panel with Russian text, Braille, and diagrams, framed by a metallic structure.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the slim profile of the board and the depth of the frame, with the display panel slightly inset.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid black back panel and the full width of the supporting frame and base plates.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness of the board and the supporting frame structure.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular tubular metal frame with right-angled joints and two wide, flat base plates for stability.
